creator: vitalijs.saronovs@gmail.com
text:
Trying to install OTRS on FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE:
- Installed Apache, mysql, perl:

Version of Perl:
This is perl 5, version 30, subversion 3 (v5.30.3) built for amd64-freebsd-thread-multi

But installing ap24-mod_perl2 - Installed 5.32.1

Got error on Apache restart:

httpd: Syntax error on line 189 of /usr/local/etc/apache24/httpd.conf: Cannot load libexec/apache24/mod_perl.so into server: 
/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.32/mach/CORE/libperl.so.5.32: Undefined symbol "getlogin_r@FBSD_1.6"

Do You know how to avoid such mistake?
